name: Verify G+ (General Mental Ability)
description: Measures general mental ability including problem-solving, critical reasoning, and learning agility. Combines numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning into a single adaptive assessment.

name: Verify Numerical Ability
description: Assesses the ability to interpret numerical data, including tables, charts, and statistical information. Measures mathematical reasoning and data interpretation skills.

name: Verify Verbal Ability
description: Measures the ability to understand and evaluate written passages, draw logical conclusions, and assess verbal reasoning skills in a business context.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to identify patterns and relationships in abstract information. Measures conceptual and analytical thinking without language or cultural bias.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions from given premises. Evaluates structured thinking and the capacity to apply rules and identify what must or cannot be true.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of basic mechanical and physical principles including forces, levers, pulleys, gears, and circuits relevant to engineering and technical roles.

name: Verify Checking
description: Measures speed and accuracy in checking and comparing information. Assesses attention to detail and error-detection skills essential for administrative and data-handling roles.

name: Verify Calculation
description: Assesses basic and intermediate arithmetic skills including addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, percentages, and ratios relevant to everyday work tasks.

name: Verify Reading Comprehension
description: Evaluates the ability to read and understand written information, extract meaning from passages, and follow written instructions accurately.

name: OPQ32r (Occupational Personality Questionnaire)
description: Comprehensive personality assessment measuring 32 work-relevant characteristics across three domains: relationships with people, thinking style, and feelings/emotions. Used for selection, development, and team building.

name: Motivational Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Measures individual motivation and engagement drivers across 18 dimensions including achievement, competition, recognition, autonomy, and commercial outlook.

name: Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire (CCSQ)
description: Personality assessment specifically designed for customer-facing roles. Measures 16 personality characteristics relevant to customer service effectiveness.

name: Work Styles Questionnaire (WSQ)
description: A shorter personality assessment measuring key work-relevant traits for high-volume recruitment. Efficient screening tool for behavioral tendencies in the workplace.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: Measures 96 behavioral skills in 15 minutes. Provides objective data on workplace behaviors for onboarding, upskilling, reskilling, and workforce planning.

name: Situational Judgement Test (SJT)
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios and evaluates judgment and decision-making. Measures how candidates would handle situations relevant to the target role.

name: Realistic Job Preview (RJP)
description: Scenario-based quizzes giving candidates a realistic feel for the job before they commit. Reduces early attrition by setting accurate expectations about role demands.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF)
description: Comprehensive framework for understanding workplace behaviors and predicting job success. Provides structured competency assessment across 8 major competency clusters and 20 competency dimensions.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses proficiency in Java 8 programming including lambda expressions, streams, functional interfaces, new date/time API, and core object-oriented concepts.

name: Java 11
description: Tests knowledge of Java 11 features including var keyword, HTTP client API, string methods, and modular programming with the Java Platform Module System.

name: Core Java
description: Comprehensive assessment of core Java programming concepts including OOP principles, collections framework, exception handling, multithreading, and I/O operations.

name: Java Spring Boot
description: Evaluates knowledge of Spring Boot framework including dependency injection, REST APIs, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security, and microservices architecture patterns.

name: Python 3
description: Assesses Python 3 programming skills including data structures, comprehensions, generators, decorators, file handling, and standard library usage.

name: Python Django
description: Tests proficiency in Django web framework including models, views, templates, ORM, forms, authentication, and REST framework for building web applications.

name: Python Data Science
description: Evaluates data science skills using Python including NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Scikit-learn, statistical analysis, and machine learning fundamentals.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Assesses modern JavaScript ES6+ including closures, promises, async/await, destructuring, modules, prototypes, and DOM manipulation.

name: TypeScript
description: Tests TypeScript proficiency including type system, interfaces, generics, enums, decorators, modules, and integration with JavaScript ecosystems.

name: React.js
description: Evaluates React.js knowledge including components, hooks, state management, virtual DOM, JSX, lifecycle methods, context API, and performance optimization.

name: Angular
description: Assesses Angular framework knowledge including components, services, dependency injection, routing, RxJS observables, forms, and TypeScript integration.

name: Node.js
description: Tests Node.js proficiency including event loop, streams, Express.js, middleware, async patterns, NPM ecosystem, and server-side JavaScript development.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Assesses .NET Framework 4.5 knowledge including CLR, C# language features, LINQ, async/await patterns, WCF, Entity Framework, and ASP.NET development.

name: C# Programming
description: Evaluates C# language proficiency including object-oriented programming, LINQ, generics, delegates, events, async programming, and .NET ecosystem.

name: C++ Programming
description: Tests C++ programming knowledge including OOP, STL, memory management, pointers, templates, move semantics, and modern C++ features (C++11/14/17).

name: SQL (New)
description: Assesses SQL proficiency including complex queries, joins, subqueries, aggregate functions, indexing, stored procedures, and database design principles.

name: MySQL
description: Tests MySQL database skills including query optimization, replication, storage engines, transactions, backup strategies, and MySQL-specific functions.

name: Microsoft SQL Server
description: Evaluates MS SQL Server knowledge including T-SQL, stored procedures, performance tuning, SSIS, SSRS, database administration, and high availability.

name: MongoDB
description: Assesses MongoDB knowledge including document modeling, CRUD operations, aggregation pipeline, indexing, replication, sharding, and schema design patterns.

name: PostgreSQL
description: Tests PostgreSQL proficiency including advanced SQL, JSONB support, window functions, CTEs, extensions, partitioning, and performance optimization.

name: Oracle PL/SQL
description: Evaluates Oracle PL/SQL programming including procedures, functions, packages, triggers, cursors, exception handling, and Oracle database administration.

name: AWS (Amazon Web Services)
description: Assesses AWS cloud services knowledge including EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, VPC, IAM, CloudFormation, and architectural best practices for cloud deployments.

name: Microsoft Azure
description: Tests Microsoft Azure knowledge including virtual machines, App Service, Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, Azure Functions, networking, and identity management.

name: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
description: Evaluates GCP skills including Compute Engine, BigQuery, Cloud Storage, Kubernetes Engine, Cloud Functions, and Google Cloud networking and security.

name: Docker
description: Assesses Docker containerization knowledge including Dockerfile creation, image management, networking, volumes, Docker Compose, and container orchestration basics.

name: Kubernetes
description: Tests Kubernetes orchestration skills including pods, deployments, services, ingress, ConfigMaps, persistent volumes, RBAC, and cluster management.

name: HTML/CSS
description: Evaluates HTML5 and CSS3 knowledge including semantic markup, responsive design, Flexbox, Grid, animations, accessibility, and modern web standards.

name: PHP Programming
description: Assesses PHP programming skills including OOP, PDO, sessions, PHP 7/8 features, Composer, MVC architecture, and web application security practices.

name: Ruby Programming
description: Tests Ruby programming knowledge including blocks, procs, lambdas, metaprogramming, gems, testing frameworks, and Rails fundamentals.

name: Go (Golang)
description: Evaluates Go programming proficiency including goroutines, channels, interfaces, error handling, packages, concurrency patterns, and standard library.

name: Scala
description: Assesses Scala programming skills including functional programming, pattern matching, implicits, type system, Akka, and JVM interoperability.

name: Kotlin
description: Tests Kotlin programming knowledge including null safety, coroutines, extension functions, data classes, sealed classes, and Android development patterns.

name: Swift Programming
description: Evaluates Swift programming proficiency including optionals, protocols, generics, closures, memory management, and iOS/macOS development fundamentals.

name: Android Development
description: Assesses Android app development skills including Activities, Fragments, Jetpack components, Material Design, data persistence, and app architecture patterns.

name: iOS Development
description: Tests iOS development knowledge including UIKit, SwiftUI, Core Data, networking, Auto Layout, app lifecycle, and Apple Human Interface Guidelines.

name: Apache Hadoop
description: Evaluates Hadoop ecosystem knowledge including HDFS, MapReduce, YARN, Hive, Pig, HBase, and big data processing architectures.

name: Apache Spark
description: Assesses Apache Spark knowledge including RDDs, DataFrames, Spark SQL, Spark Streaming, MLlib, and distributed computing concepts for big data processing.

name: Machine Learning
description: Tests machine learning knowledge including supervised/unsupervised learning, neural networks, model evaluation, feature engineering, and algorithm selection.

name: Data Science Fundamentals
description: Evaluates foundational data science skills including statistics, probability, data wrangling, visualization, hypothesis testing, and experimental design.

name: Tableau
description: Assesses Tableau data visualization skills including dashboard creation, calculated fields, data blending, parameters, LOD expressions, and storytelling with data.

name: Microsoft Power BI
description: Tests Power BI proficiency including DAX formulas, data modeling, Power Query, report design, dashboards, and data refresh strategies.

name: R Programming
description: Evaluates R programming skills including data manipulation with tidyverse, statistical modeling, visualization with ggplot2, and reproducible research.

name: Linux Administration
description: Assesses Linux system administration skills including shell scripting, file systems, process management, networking, security, package management, and service configuration.

name: Windows Server Administration
description: Tests Windows Server knowledge including Active Directory, Group Policy, Hyper-V, IIS, PowerShell, DNS, DHCP, and server security hardening.

name: Networking Fundamentals
description: Evaluates network knowledge including TCP/IP, OSI model, routing, switching, firewalls, VPN, DNS, subnetting, and network troubleshooting.

name: Cisco Networking
description: Assesses Cisco networking skills including router/switch configuration, VLANs, spanning tree, OSPF, EIGRP, ACLs, and Cisco IOS troubleshooting.

name: Cybersecurity
description: Tests cybersecurity knowledge including threat modeling, encryption, authentication, network security, vulnerability management, incident response, and compliance.

name: DevOps Practices
description: Evaluates DevOps knowledge including CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, monitoring, logging, automation, configuration management, and agile practices.

name: Git Version Control
description: Assesses Git proficiency including branching strategies, merging, rebasing, conflict resolution, hooks, submodules, and collaborative development workflows.

name: Jenkins CI/CD
description: Tests Jenkins knowledge including pipeline configuration, Jenkinsfile, plugins, distributed builds, security, and continuous delivery automation.

name: Agile & Scrum
description: Evaluates Agile methodology understanding including Scrum framework, sprint planning, user stories, retrospectives, Kanban, and agile project management.

name: Selenium Testing
description: Assesses Selenium WebDriver knowledge including element location strategies, waits, Page Object Model, TestNG/JUnit integration, and cross-browser testing.

name: REST API Design
description: Tests RESTful API design knowledge including HTTP methods, status codes, authentication, versioning, pagination, rate limiting, and API documentation.

name: Microservices Architecture
description: Evaluates microservices knowledge including service decomposition, API gateway patterns, event-driven architecture, saga pattern, and distributed systems concepts.

name: Software Design Patterns
description: Assesses knowledge of software design patterns including creational, structural, and behavioral patterns, SOLID principles, and architectural patterns.

name: SAP Fundamentals
description: Tests SAP ERP knowledge including modules (FI, CO, MM, SD, HR), navigation, business processes, and SAP system landscape fundamentals.

name: Salesforce
description: Evaluates Salesforce platform knowledge including Apex, Visualforce, Lightning components, SOQL, workflows, process builder, and CRM best practices.

name: Microsoft Excel (Advanced)
description: Assesses advanced Excel skills including pivot tables, VLOOKUP/INDEX-MATCH, macros, VBA, data analysis tools, conditional formatting, and financial functions.

name: Microsoft Office Suite
description: Tests proficiency across Microsoft Office applications including Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook for business productivity and document creation.

name: Typing Speed & Accuracy
description: Measures typing speed (words per minute) and accuracy for data entry, administrative, and clerical roles requiring keyboard proficiency.

name: Data Entry
description: Evaluates data entry skills including speed, accuracy, attention to detail, and the ability to accurately transfer information between formats and systems.

name: Accounting Fundamentals
description: Assesses accounting knowledge including double-entry bookkeeping, financial statements, GAAP/IFRS principles, journal entries, and basic audit concepts.

name: Financial Analysis
description: Tests financial analysis skills including ratio analysis, DCF modeling, budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, and investment evaluation techniques.

name: Customer Service Skills
description: Evaluates customer service competencies including communication, problem resolution, empathy, product knowledge application, and handling difficult interactions.

name: Business English
description: Assesses business English proficiency including professional writing, reading comprehension, grammar, vocabulary, and formal communication in workplace contexts.

name: English Comprehension
description: Tests English language comprehension including reading passages, vocabulary, inference, and understanding of written materials in professional settings.

name: Administrative Skills
description: Evaluates administrative competencies including organization, scheduling, document management, communication, office procedures, and multitasking abilities.

name: Automata - Coding Simulation
description: AI-powered coding simulation that measures programming ability through real coding tasks. Evaluates logical correctness, code quality, efficiency, and problem-solving in a live IDE environment.

name: Automata SQL (New)
description: SQL coding simulation that assesses database query writing skills through hands-on tasks. Evaluates ability to write correct, efficient SQL queries against real database schemas.

name: Automata Front End
description: Front-end development simulation assessing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript skills through practical web development tasks in a browser-based IDE.

name: Contact Center Simulation
description: Realistic job simulation emulating call center environment. Measures multitasking, customer interaction, data entry accuracy, and problem-solving under time pressure.

name: Business Simulation
description: Immersive business scenario simulation assessing decision-making, strategic thinking, resource allocation, and commercial acumen in realistic management situations.

name: Managerial Simulation (In-tray/E-tray)
description: E-tray exercise simulating a manager's inbox. Assesses prioritization, delegation, decision-making, and communication skills through realistic workplace scenarios.

name: Assessment & Development Center Exercises
description: Suite of assessment center exercises including group discussions, presentations, role plays, and case studies designed to evaluate leadership and interpersonal competencies.

name: 360 Multi-Rater Feedback System
description: Comprehensive 360-degree feedback system collecting ratings from managers, peers, direct reports, and self. Used for leadership development and performance improvement.

name: Leadership Assessment
description: Assesses leadership potential and readiness across multiple dimensions including strategic thinking, people leadership, change management, and results orientation.

name: Sales Aptitude Assessment
description: Measures sales-specific behaviors and personality traits including persuasion, resilience, commercial awareness, relationship building, and achievement drive.

name: Graduate Assessment
description: Combined assessment for graduate recruitment measuring cognitive ability, personality traits, and potential for learning and development in professional roles.

name: Management Scenarios
description: Situational judgment test presenting management-specific scenarios. Evaluates decision-making, people management, conflict resolution, and strategic thinking skills.

name: Teamwork Assessment
description: Assesses teamwork and collaboration competencies including communication, cooperation, conflict management, and contribution to team goals.

name: Communication Skills Assessment
description: Evaluates verbal and written communication competencies including clarity, persuasion, active listening, presentation skills, and stakeholder communication.

name: Problem Solving Assessment
description: Measures structured problem-solving ability including problem identification, root cause analysis, solution generation, and evaluation of alternatives.

name: Critical Thinking Assessment
description: Assesses higher-order thinking skills including analysis, evaluation, inference, interpretation, and the ability to identify assumptions and draw logical conclusions.

name: Attention to Detail
description: Measures precision and thoroughness in reviewing information, identifying errors, and maintaining accuracy across numerical and textual content.

name: Emotional Intelligence Assessment
description: Measures emotional intelligence dimensions including self-awareness, self-regulation, empathy, social skills, and motivation in workplace contexts.

name: Apache HBase (New)
description: Tests Apache HBase knowledge including column-family data model, region servers, compaction, HBase shell operations, and integration with Hadoop ecosystem.

name: Vue.js
description: Assesses Vue.js framework knowledge including reactivity system, components, Vuex state management, Vue Router, composition API, and single-file components.

name: Terraform (Infrastructure as Code)
description: Tests Terraform IaC knowledge including HCL syntax, providers, modules, state management, workspace management, and infrastructure provisioning workflows.

name: Ansible
description: Evaluates Ansible automation knowledge including playbooks, roles, inventory management, modules, Jinja2 templates, and configuration management patterns.

name: Project Management
description: Assesses project management knowledge including planning, scheduling, risk management, stakeholder management, budgeting, and both waterfall and agile methodologies.

name: Six Sigma & Lean
description: Tests Six Sigma and Lean methodology knowledge including DMAIC, value stream mapping, statistical process control, waste elimination, and continuous improvement.

name: Digital Marketing
description: Evaluates digital marketing knowledge including SEO, SEM, social media marketing, content strategy, email marketing, analytics, and conversion optimization.

name: Supply Chain Management
description: Assesses supply chain knowledge including procurement, logistics, inventory management, demand planning, supplier relationship management, and global trade.

name: Human Resources Management
description: Tests HR management knowledge including recruitment, employee relations, performance management, compensation & benefits, employment law, and organizational development.

name: Verbal Reasoning (Entry Level)
description: Entry-level verbal reasoning test suitable for clerical and administrative roles. Measures basic comprehension, logic, and language understanding in workplace texts.

name: Numerical Reasoning (Entry Level)
description: Entry-level numerical test for operational and clerical roles. Assesses basic arithmetic, data interpretation from simple tables and charts, and numerical accuracy.

name: Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures spatial visualization and mental rotation abilities. Relevant for engineering, design, architecture, and technical roles requiring 3D thinking.

name: Safety Consciousness Assessment
description: Evaluates safety-related attitudes and behaviors for industrial and manufacturing roles. Measures risk awareness, rule compliance, and safety-conscious decision making.

name: Call Center Aptitude
description: Assesses aptitude for call center roles including verbal communication, customer handling, multitasking, system navigation, and problem resolution under pressure.

name: Retail Aptitude Assessment
description: Measures aptitude for retail roles including customer interaction, sales technique, product knowledge application, cash handling, and store operations awareness.

name: Banking & Finance Aptitude
description: Assesses banking and finance sector knowledge including financial products, regulations, customer advisory, risk management, and compliance requirements.

name: Healthcare Worker Assessment
description: Evaluates aptitude for healthcare roles measuring empathy, patient care orientation, stress tolerance, attention to detail, and teamwork in clinical settings.

name: Mechanical Aptitude
description: Assesses mechanical reasoning and aptitude for technical/engineering roles including understanding of levers, gears, pulleys, circuits, and physical principles.

name: Electrical Aptitude
description: Tests electrical knowledge including circuits, voltage, current, resistance, motors, transformers, safety procedures, and basic electronics for technician roles.

name: Entrepreneurial Potential
description: Measures traits associated with entrepreneurial success including innovation drive, risk tolerance, resilience, opportunity recognition, and self-efficacy.

name: Integrity & Values Assessment
description: Assesses workplace integrity, ethical values, and counterproductive work behavior risk. Measures honesty, reliability, rule adherence, and trustworthiness.

name: Stress Tolerance Assessment
description: Measures ability to handle pressure, remain calm under stress, manage workload effectively, and maintain performance quality in demanding situations.
